name: Router
comment:
A simple nested router for single page applications.

See [Example](https://github.com/apuchenkin/elm-nested-router/tree/master/example) ([Live demo](http://apuchenkin.github.io/elm-nested-router/example))
and [Tests](https://github.com/apuchenkin/elm-nested-router/tree/master/test/Test) for more details

@docs dispatch, dispatchWithFlags, initialState

values.name: dispatch
values.comment:
Launches the router.
  Provide `init` function and router config as parameters
values.type: ( WithRouter route state, Cmd msg ) -> RouterConfig route (WithRouter route state) msg -> Program Never (WithRouter route state) (Msg route msg)

values.name: dispatchWithFlags
values.comment:
Launches the router.
  Provide `init` function and router config as parameters
values.type: (flags -> ( WithRouter route state, Cmd msg )) -> RouterConfig route (WithRouter route state) msg -> Program flags (WithRouter route state) (Msg route msg)

values.name: initialState
values.comment: Initial state for router. Fed this into your application state

name: Router.Types

unions.name: RouterConfig
unions.comment:
`RouterConfig` is configuration for the router:

  * `html5` — Use html5 pushState.
  * `removeTrailingSlash` — Trailing slashes will be removed from matched and builded urls
  * `routes` — A list of routes available for routing
  * `routeConfig` — A mapping between route and route configuration
  * `update` — Function that describes how to handle specific application message
  * `layout` — Main renderer function that combines named views into a single HTML
  * `onTransition` — List of default mesasges that should be executed on every router transition
  * `subscriptions` — A list of subscriptions (see: [elm-lang/html](doc) for details)

  [doc]: http://package.elm-lang.org/packages/apuchenkin/elm-nested-router/latest/URL-Route#Config
cases: { html5 : Bool, removeTrailingSlash : Bool, routes : List route, routeConfig : route -> RouteConfig route state msg, update : Router route state msg -> msg -> state -> ( state, Cmd msg ), layout : Router route state msg -> state -> Views msg -> Html msg, onTransition : Router route state msg -> Maybe (Route route) -> Maybe (Route route) -> List msg, subscriptions : state -> Sub msg }

aliases.name: RouteConfig
aliases.comment:
`RouteConfig` is a configuration related to specific route
  * `route` — Describes route structure (see: [`URL.Route.Config`][doc] for details)
  * `render` — Function that describes how to render application state as named views
  * `actions` — List of messages to execute

  [doc]: http://package.elm-lang.org/packages/apuchenkin/elm-nested-router/latest/URL-Route#Config
aliases.type: { route : Config route, render : Router route state msg -> state -> Views msg -> Views msg, actions : List msg }

aliases.name: Router
aliases.comment:
A `Router` is a provider of following functions:

  * `buildUrl` — Builds an URL for provided `Route`
  * `forward` — Preforms a transition to provided `Route`
  * `redirect` — Redirects to provided `Route`
  * `match` — Performs attempt to match provided URL.

  Router also exposes it's `config`
aliases.type: { config : RouterConfig route state msg, buildUrl : Route route -> URL, forward : Route route -> Cmd msg, redirect : Route route -> Cmd msg, match : URL -> Maybe (Route route) }

aliases.name: WithRouter
aliases.comment: Type extension for the application state

name: URL.Matcher

values.name: buildURL
values.comment: Build URL for specified route

values.name: hasTrailingSlash
values.comment: Checks whether URL has trailing slash

values.name: match
values.comment: Tries to match given URL into route
values.type: GetConfig route -> List route -> URL -> Maybe (Route route)

values.name: removeTrailingSlash
values.comment: Removes trailing slash from URL if any

name: URL.Route

aliases.name: Route
aliases.comment: combined abstract route type with params
aliases.type: { route : route, arguments : Arguments, query : Arguments }

values.name: childs
values.comment: Retreives direct childs for a given route
values.type: GetConfig route -> List route -> Maybe route -> List route

values.name: config
values.comment: Route config constructor

values.name: isChild
values.comment: Checks whether route is a child of another route
values.type: GetConfig route -> Maybe route -> route -> Bool

values.name: parents
values.comment: Retreives parents chain of a givent route
values.type: GetConfig route -> List route -> route -> List route

values.name: route
values.comment: Route constructor

values.name: traverse
values.comment: Retreives route traversal from top up to a given route
values.type: GetConfig route -> List route -> route -> List route

binops.comment: Infix version of config, combines parent and segment in route config

values.comment: Combines two URL segments

values.comment: URL arguments that matches one of provided strings

values.comment: URL arguments that matches integers

values.name: maybe
